messages.content: Can you make this comment correct in grammar.Willow has made limited progress this semester. She needs adult support along with concrete materials and number cards to assist her in solving mathematical problems.   Her mathematical progress would be assisted greatly by a continued practice of her number facts over the school break. Her skills in this area are currently impeding her ability to solve problems. She will need to focus in Year 4 on setting out her work in a more orderly fashion to clearly show the steps involved in her calculations. This will assist her to avoid making simple errors in her calculations. An improvement in Willow’s focus and intrinsic motivation would see her results elevated to match her ability. She is encouraged to ask questions to obtain clarification and take her time to ensure greater accuracy is achieved and her full potential is reached.

Willow has made limited progress this semester. She needs adult support, along with concrete materials and number cards, to assist her in solving mathematical problems. Her mathematical progress would be greatly assisted by continued practice of her number facts over the school break. Her skills in this area are currently impeding her ability to solve problems. She will need to focus in Year 4 on setting out her work in a more orderly fashion to clearly show the steps involved in her calculations. This will assist her in avoiding making simple errors in her calculations. An improvement in Willow’s focus and intrinsic motivation would see her results elevated to match her ability. She is encouraged to ask questions to obtain clarification and take her time to ensure greater accuracy is achieved and her full potential is reached.

can you reword this comment please.  Willow has made limited progress this semester. She needs adult support, along with concrete materials and number cards, to assist her in solving mathematical problems. Her mathematical progress would be greatly assisted by continued practice of her number facts over the school break. Her skills in this area are currently impeding her ability to solve problems. She will need to focus in Year 4 on setting out her work in a more orderly fashion to clearly show the steps involved in her calculations. This will assist her in avoiding making simple errors in her calculations. An improvement in Willow’s focus and intrinsic motivation would see her results elevated to match her ability. She is encouraged to ask questions to obtain clarification and take her time to ensure greater accuracy is achieved and her full potential is reached.

Willow's progress this semester has been limited, and she would benefit from adult support, as well as concrete materials and number cards, to help her solve mathematical problems. Continued practice of her number facts over the school break would greatly enhance her mathematical progress. Currently, her skills in this area are hindering her problem-solving abilities. In Year 4, it will be important for Willow to focus on organizing her work in a more orderly manner, clearly showing the steps involved in her calculations. This will help her avoid making simple errors. By improving her focus and intrinsic motivation, Willow can achieve results that are in line with her capabilities. She is encouraged to ask questions for clarification and to take her time to ensure greater accuracy, thus reaching her full potential.

Can you do the same for this comment please.  Logan is a capable mathematician; however, he needs to ensure that careless mistakes do not jeopardise his results. Logan has the ability to think mathematically and is currently working to increase his recall of basic number facts in order to streamline his work. He will need to focus in Year 4 on setting out his work in a more orderly fashion to clearly show the steps involved in his mathematical processes. This will assist him to avoid making simple errors in his calculations. He is encouraged to ask questions to obtain clarification, and take his time to ensure greater accuracy is achieved and his full potential is reached. An improvement in Logan’s focus and intrinsic motivation would see his results elevated to match his ability.

While Logan is a capable mathematician, he should take care to avoid careless mistakes that could jeopardize his results. Although he demonstrates the ability to think mathematically, he is currently working on improving his recall of basic number facts to streamline his work. In Year 4, it will be important for Logan to focus on presenting his work in a more structured manner, clearly indicating the steps involved in his mathematical processes. This will help him avoid simple errors in his calculations. Logan is encouraged to ask questions for clarification and to take his time to ensure greater accuracy, ultimately reaching his full potential. Elevating his results to match his ability will require improvements in Logan's focus and intrinsic motivation.

now try this one...  Benjamin is a capable mathematician; however, he needs to ensure that careless mistakes do not jeopardise the accuracy of his results. Benjamin often requires multiple opportunities in order to firmly grasp new concepts and at times he finds it a challenge to transfer his existing knowledge to new situations. Benjamin is currently working towards gaining a more fluid recall of his automatic/basic number facts which will help to streamline the process of his problem solving. He is encouraged to ask questions to obtain clarification, and take his time to ensure greater accuracy is achieved and his full potential is reached. An improvement in Benjamin’s focus and intrinsic motivation would see his results elevated to match his ability.

Although Benjamin is a capable mathematician, he should be cautious of careless mistakes that may affect the accuracy of his results. Benjamin often requires multiple opportunities to fully grasp new concepts, and he sometimes struggles to apply his existing knowledge to unfamiliar situations. Currently, Benjamin is focusing on improving his recall of basic number facts to enhance the efficiency of his problem-solving process. It is recommended that he asks questions to clarify any uncertainties and takes his time to ensure greater accuracy, enabling him to reach his full potential. Elevating Benjamin's results to align with his ability will require improvements in his focus and intrinsic motivation.

Although Benjamin has satisfactory results, he should be cautious of careless mistakes that may affect the accuracy of his results. Currently, Benjamin is focusing on improving his recall of basic number facts to enhance the efficiency of his problem-solving process. It is recommended that he asks questions to clarify any uncertainties and take his time to ensure greater accuracy, enabling him to reach his full potential. Elevating Benjamin’s results to align with his ability will require improvements in his focus and intrinsic motivation.

Although Benjamin is a capable mathematician with satisfactory results, it is important for him to be cautious of careless mistakes that may impact the accuracy of his results. Benjamin often requires multiple opportunities to fully grasp new concepts and occasionally faces challenges when applying his existing knowledge to unfamiliar situations. Currently, he is dedicated to improving his recall of basic number facts to streamline his problem-solving process. It is recommended that Benjamin actively asks questions to clarify any uncertainties and takes the necessary time to ensure greater accuracy in his work, as this will allow him to reach his full potential. Achieving results that align with Benjamin's ability will require improvements in his focus and intrinsic motivation.

can you fix this up please... Maya has made steady progress this semester but extended time away has meant she has missed some lesson content. Currently, Maya is focused on improving her recall of basic number facts, which will contribute to a more streamlined problem-solving process. Maya often thrives with multiple opportunities to fully understand new mathematical concepts, and she occasionally encounters difficulties when applying her existing knowledge to unfamiliar situations. Currently, Maya is devoted to enhancing her recall of basic number facts, which will facilitate a more efficient problem-solving process. Maya demonstrates attentive listening skills and the ability to work independently, but it is encouraged for her to ask questions to seek clarification, enabling her to reach her full potential.

Cohen has made encouraging progress this semester. It is pleasing to see his confidence in his mathematical ability slowly improving. Working with friends, support staff as well as the use of concrete materials and number charts have helped him to have greater success when solving problems.  Cohen is working towards gaining a more fluid recall of his basic number facts but needs more practice in this area. Sadly, he does tend to give up and gets emotional when he can’t see a solution easily or he has not brought his glasses with him to class.  Cohen always listens attentively and is to be congratulated on his diligence and determination to succeed in this area of the curriculum.

Cohen’s progress this semester has been encouraging, and it is delightful to observe his growing confidence in his mathematical abilities. Collaborating with friends and support staff, as well as utilizing concrete materials and number charts, has contributed to his success in problem-solving. Cohen is actively working towards improving his recall of basic number facts; however, he would benefit from additional practice in this area. Unfortunately, he sometimes becomes frustrated and emotional when faced with challenging problems or if he forgets to bring his glasses to class. Cohen consistently demonstrates attentive listening skills and should be commended for his diligence and determination to excel in this aspect of the curriculum.

How would you write this comment? Charley is a capable mathematician, but he needs to ensure that careless mistakes do not jeopardise the accuracy of his results. Charley can think mathematically however struggles to remain focused on set tasks.  He is currently working to increase his recall of basic number facts to streamline his work. Charley will need to focus next year on setting out his work in a more orderly fashion that clearly shows the steps involved in his work. This will assist him to avoid making simple errors in his calculations. An improvement in Charley’s focus and motivation would see his results elevated to match his ability.

While Charley is a capable mathematician, it is important that he remains vigilant to prevent careless mistakes from compromising the accuracy of his results. While he demonstrates mathematical thinking skills, he often struggles to stay focused on assigned tasks. Currently, Charley is actively working on improving his recall of basic number facts to make his work more efficient. In the coming year, it will be crucial for him to focus on presenting his work in a more organized manner, clearly displaying the steps involved in his calculations. This approach will help him avoid making simple errors. Elevating Charley's results to align with his ability will require improvements in his focus and motivation.
